cards.title: Headache & Migraine
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Migraine triggers (HALT: Hunger, Anxiety/Stress, Lack of sleep, Tiredness)
  • Prophylaxis: Mg 400mg, riboflavin 400mg, CoQ10 150mg
  • Tension headache: Pericranial massage, posture correction
  • Thunderclap headache: Immediate referral (SAH until proven otherwise)

cards.title: Neuropathy & ANS
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Peripheral neuropathy: B1, B6, B12, ALA 600mg BD
  • Autonomic neuropathy testing: HRV, Ewing's battery
  • POTS: Salt loading, compression stockings, exercise protocol
  • Diabetic neuropathy naturopathic protocol

cards.title: Cognitive Health
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • MMSE & MoCA screening tools
  • Dementia prevention: MIND diet, exercise, sleep, social engagement
  • Nootropics: Bacopa, Lion's Mane, Ginkgo biloba
  • Neuroplasticity-enhancing lifestyle interventions

cards.title: Stroke & Multiple Sclerosis
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Stroke prevention: BP control, AF management, Mediterranean diet
  • Post-stroke rehab: Acupuncture evidence, yoga, music therapy
  • MS: Vitamin D3 5000–10000 IU, omega-3, low saturated fat (Swank diet)
  • Parkinson's: Mucuna pruriens (L-DOPA), antioxidants
